import asyncio
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager

from fastapi import FastAPI


async def startup_event():
    print("Startup event triggered: Application is starting up!")
    # Simulate some async initialization work
    await asyncio.sleep(1)
    print("Startup event: Initialization complete.")


async def shutdown_event():
    print("Shutdown event triggered: Application is shutting down!")
    # Simulate some async cleanup work
    await asyncio.sleep(0.5)
    print("Shutdown event: Cleanup complete.")


@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    # This block runs BEFORE the application starts serving requests
    print("Lifespan: Entering startup phase.")
    await startup_event()
    print("Lifespan: Startup phase complete. Application is ready to serve.")
    yield
    # This block runs AFTER the application stops serving requests
    print("Lifespan: Entering shutdown phase.")
    await shutdown_event()
    print("Lifespan: Shutdown phase complete. Application is fully stopped.")


app = FastAPI(lifespan=lifespan)


@app.get("/")
async def read_root():
    return {"message": "Hello from FastAPI!"}


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    # To run this, save it as e.g., main.py and run: uvicorn main:app --reload
    # Or for a single run without reload: uvicorn main:app
    print("Starting Uvicorn server...")
    uvicorn.run(app, host="0.0.0.0", port=8000)
    print("Uvicorn server stopped.")
